news.title: Russia launches deadliest aerial attack in months, killing 18 in Ukraine
news.snippet: A Ukrainian drone attack killed two people in Russia, Moscow says, after an Orthodox Easter truce.

news.title: Russian strikes kill at least 17 across Ukraine in worst attack of 2026
news.snippet: In Russia, a major Ukrainian drone attack on the Black Sea port of Tuapse killed two people. Read more at straitstimes.com.
